overall.description: A first-person metro ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player travels on an elevated train line departing from a station, traversing a dense cyberpunk cityscape illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic billboards, before arriving at Ellison Plaza station. The footage showcases the game's signature neon-drenched aesthetic with atmospheric haze and futuristic architecture.

events.description: train begins accelerating, departing the station platform

agents.ego_description: waiting inside the metro car at the station platform, observing pedestrians outside before the train starts moving

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket walking along the platform outside the train window

entered.detail: illuminated blue platform sign reading 'ELLISON PLAZA' mounted on the platform edge
train interior control panel with glowing cyan screen and illuminated route map display
yellow and red safety markings along the platform edge visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a metro train car stationed at an elevated platform. The 'ELLISON PLAZA' sign glows blue on the platform edge while a control panel with a route map sits to the right. Pedestrians walk past the window on the platform outside. At 12 seconds, the train lurches forward and begins departing the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro line through neon commercial district

events.description: train exits the station structure into open air between densely packed skyscrapers
passing a massive holographic billboard displaying a woman's face on the side of a building

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated train through Night City, observing the neon-lit skyline and passing advertisements

entered.detail: bright cyan neon sign with 'NAGAI' text glowing against the dark building facade
vertical neon sign for 'SECHOCH' hotel with green and white illumination
cyan neon sign reading 'NO-TELL MOTEL' visible between buildings
large holographic advertisement projection showing a woman's face on building side
dense cluster of towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The train accelerates through the open air of Night City, passing between towering skyscrapers adorned with vibrant neon signs. The 'NAGAI' sign glows cyan on the left, followed by hotel advertisements and a massive holographic billboard. The city sprawls below with sparse traffic visible on the streets as the metro car travels at high speed through the commercial district.

events.description: train begins decelerating as it approaches the station platform
train arrives at Ellison Plaza station and comes to a complete stop
train doors open revealing the platform interior with waiting passengers

agents.ego_description: waiting as the train slows to a stop at Ellison Plaza station, then turning to view the platform as doors open

notable_agents.action: seated passenger wearing a red cap waiting on the platform bench
standing passenger in gray jacket near the platform edge looking at the arriving train

entered.detail: large illuminated blue wall sign reading 'ELLISON PLAZA' inside the station
metal benches with seated passengers visible through the open train doors
glass doors leading to the station exit with green lighting above

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it enters Ellison Plaza station, the interior lighting replacing the neon city glow. The large blue station sign becomes visible on the platform wall as the train comes to a stop. Doors open at 49 seconds to reveal passengers waiting on benches, including a person in a red cap, while the camera turns to show the train interior and platform area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a stationary metro car that journeys through a neon-drenched cityscape before arriving at a futuristic terminal. It begins inside the train at an elevated platform, where a blue Ellison Plaza sign and passing pedestrians are visible through the window before the car lurches forward. As the train accelerates into the open air, the environment shifts into a blur of towering skyscrapers and vibrant cyan Nagai signs, passing massive holographic billboards that overlook the sprawling commercial district below. The scene then transitions as the train decelerates and enters the station, replacing the external neon glow with the sterile interior lighting of the platform. Finally, the train comes to a complete stop and the doors open to reveal waiting passengers and the station interior.
